judge_result.short_rationale: Only the fresh-air step matches. It omits the required immediate actions to call 911/ambulance if not breathing and to call poison control or a doctor. It also adds unsupported cross-incident advice about removing contaminated clothing, rinsing skin/eyes, and not inducing vomiting, plus unsupported ER/bring-container guidance.
